mapper.select: SELECT * FROM verification_code WHERE ((phone = #{phone} AND phone IS NOT NULL) OR (email = #{email} AND email IS NOT NULL)) AND type = #{type} AND status = 1 AND expire_time > #{now} ORDER BY create_time DESC LIMIT 1
mapper.update: UPDATE verification_code SET status = 0 WHERE ((phone = #{phone} AND phone IS NOT NULL) OR (email = #{email} AND email IS NOT NULL)) AND type = #{type}
